text:
お疲れ様でした。
一部始終の観察をさせてもらいましたが
概ね問題はありません。

とはいえ、報告までが任務となります故
達成報告をお待ちしております

Great work. I watched over the entire ordeal
and didn't see anything in particular I think
needs addressing.

Be that as it may, though, your mission is not
actually over until you report back to me,
so I await your return.
